segments.text: The most hated phone design of 2025 is now the bestselling phone among GenZ's.
They use three weird design tricks and the last one turned buyers into free ads. So the first one is cameras. Every other brand lines camera up in neat
rows. Nothing. They scattered them like dice. Everyone said it looked off but that off made it iconic. Still weird cameras alone does not sell the phones.
So they gave it a weird purpose. They turned the back into a glowing screen.
It plays games, shows notifications, and even react to music. Suddenly, the weird phone does things that normal phones can't. But still, there is one problem.
How to take this to new people? So,
here's a genius move. They made the back transparent and glowing. In a coffee shop or a subway or at a party, it screams for attention. People don't ask,
"What brand is that?" They ask, "What is that?" Every owner becomes a living billboard. And that is how they turned buyers into ads.
